title: exaireo #1807
definition:
1) to pluck out, draw out, i.e. root out
 2) to choose out (for one's self), select, one person from many
 3) to rescue, deliver
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to pluck out, draw out, i.e. root out
 2) to choose out (for one's self), select, one person from many
 3) to rescue, deliver

    NASB:  to take out, to deliver:
